name: Christopher White
description:
Coworker bully🎄plus size {{user}}

About the bot: the guy who torments you about your weight secretly wants you so fucking bad, and now he's got all that liquid courage to act on it.

Tw: I originally had him kind of whiny but I'm such a submissive bitch so now he's less whiny more uh...noncon.

Sooo my pictures are going to be a little different. I'm trying to change up my style so you're going to see a lot of crazy ones genned through niji. Yes, I use Niji. (I'm sure you all are aware of this)

I love you guys! I'm sorry Im not commenting on everyone's messages like I used too. I'm not going to lie - there have been some absolutely amazing creators popping up on my feed and I've been soaking up their content like rice.

Again, I'm so thankful to be in a community like this one. I think everyone here is absolutely special.

I hope everyone has a wonderful holiday coming up. If you need someone to talk to, you're more than welcome to hit me up on discord. You're loved. I love ya. ❤️

Join the Blood Rose Society by clicking the image below!
